title: Higuma Humiliates Shanks in the Bar
description: On pages 21–24, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Higuma and his bandits enter the bar, testing Shanks’ patience while Luffy watches the insult with anger.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: GIVE ME A RAG AND I'LL CLEAN UP.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT OUGHT TO KEEP YOU BUSY FOR A WHILE.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAR HAR HAR HAR HAR! CAP'N!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: He made you look like a weaking!!! Why didn't you fight him?!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: Sure, they outnumbered you, and maybe they looked pretty tough, but what kind of man lets himself be treated like that then laughs about it? You're a disgrace to all pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHEN YOU GROW UP MAYBE YOU'LL UNDER- STAND,KID.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: HE JUST GOT SOME GROG ON ME, THAT'S ALL. NEEDLESS KILLING DOESN'T MAKE YOU A MAN.

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: HMPH! to go find a real role model!

summary: Higuma humiliates Shanks in front of the bar, but Shanks refuses to escalate. Luffy sees this as cowardice, creating the emotional setup for what comes later.
